title: 2026-06-18 Hong Kong Orchid Chrome Rev2
summary: Rev2 Hong Kong set across Sham Shui Po fabric market, Tai Kwun heritage gallery, West Kowloon waterfront steps, and Central Star Ferry pier, using user feedback from the strong third candidate to emphasize personality, social energy, outfit choice, and composition.
summaryJa: 香港のアルバム。色の軸はオーキッドクローム。構成はマーケット、ミュージアム、イベント会場、移動。
